title: SubscriptionDeferralInfo
description: Contains the new desired expiry time for a subscription deferral.

expectedExpiryTimeMillis.description: The expected expiry time for the subscription. If the current expiry time does not match, the deferral will not occur.

desiredExpiryTimeMillis.description: The desired next expiry time to assign to the subscription. Must be later than the current expiry time.
